verses.1: Then these three men stopped answering Job, because he was righteous in his own eyes.
verses.2: But the anger of Elihu the son of Barachel the Buzite, of the family of Ram, burned against Job; his anger burned because he justified himself before God.
verses.3: And his anger burned against his three friends because they had found no answer, yet they had condemned Job.
verses.4: Now Elihu had waited to speak to Job because they were years older than he.
verses.5: But when Elihu saw that there was no answer in the mouth of the three men, his anger burned.
verses.6: So Elihu the son of Barachel the Buzite spoke out and said, “I am young in years and you are old; Therefore I was shy and afraid to tell you what I think.
verses.7: “I thought age should speak, And increased years should teach wisdom.
verses.8: “But it is a spirit that is in mankind, And the breath of the Almighty gives them understanding.
verses.9: “The abundant in years may not be wise, Nor may elders understand justice.
verses.10: “So I say, ‘Listen to me, I too will tell what I think.’
verses.11: “Behold, I waited for your words, I listened to your skillful speech, While you pondered what to say.
verses.12: “I also paid close attention to you; But indeed, there was no one who refuted Job, Not one of you who answered his words.
verses.13: “So do not say, ‘We have found wisdom: God will defeat him, not man.’
verses.14: “But he has not presented his words against me, Nor will I reply to him with your arguments.
verses.15: “They are dismayed, they no longer answer; Words have failed them.
verses.16: “Should I wait, because they are not speaking, Because they have stopped and no longer answer?
verses.17: “I too will give my share of answers; I also will tell my opinion.
verses.18: “For I am full of words; The spirit within me compels me.
verses.19: “Behold, my belly is like unvented wine; Like new wineskins, it is about to burst.
verses.20: “Let me speak so that I may get relief; Let me open my lips and answer.
verses.21: “Let me be partial to no one, Nor flatter any man.
verses.22: “For I do not know how to flatter, Otherwise my Maker would quickly take me away.
